openPositions.title: Open Positions
openPositions.subtitle: Explore current opportunities at our school

positions.title: Mathematics Teacher
positions.description: We are seeking an enthusiastic Mathematics Teacher for grades 9-12. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in advanced mathematics and experience with innovative teaching methods.
responsibilities: Develop and implement engaging lesson plans
Assess student progress and provide feedback
Participate in school events and parent meetings
requirements: Master’s degree in Mathematics or related field

positions.title: Admissions Officer
positions.description: Join our admissions team to help guide prospective families through the enrollment process.

positions.title: School Librarian
positions.description: Manage our school library and promote reading culture among students.

applicationProcess.title: Application Process
applicationProcess.subtitle: Simple steps to join our team

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Complete our online application form with your resume and cover letter.

steps.title: Initial Screening
steps.description: Our HR team reviews applications and contacts qualified candidates.

steps.title: Interview Process
steps.description: Participate in interviews with department heads and school leadership.

steps.title: Demo Lesson/Task
steps.description: Teaching candidates conduct a demo lesson; other positions complete relevant tasks.

steps.title: Offer & Onboarding
steps.description: Successful candidates receive an offer and begin our comprehensive onboarding process.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about careers at our school

items.question: What is the typical hiring timeline?
items.answer: The hiring process usually takes 3-4 weeks from application to offer, depending on the position and interview availability.

items.question: Do you provide relocation assistance?
items.answer: Yes, we offer relocation assistance for select positions. Details are discussed during the offer stage.

items.question: Are there opportunities for career advancement?
items.answer: Absolutely! We prioritize internal promotions and provide clear career paths for all staff members.

items.question: What is the school's approach to professional development?
items.answer: We allocate a dedicated budget for each staff member's professional development and encourage attendance at workshops and conferences.

items.question: Do you hire international candidates?
items.answer: Yes, we welcome applications from qualified international candidates who have the right to work in India.

contactCTA.title: Still Have Questions?
